CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/RICHARD LIEBERMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/PETER ROOT MAKING A SPECIAL APPEARANCE FOR SETTLEMENT. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1000 SUTTER ST, #318, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVIC- TION STAYED TO 10PM, 3-29-94 - RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - UPON VACATING 3-29-94 PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEBOGUE, JAY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1000 SUTTER ST, RM#318, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-29-1994, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 3-29-94, 10PM. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES.
